title: The Practice of Hatha Yoga for the Treatment of Pain Associated with Endometriosis
journal: Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.)
headline: The Practice of Hatha Yoga for the Treatment of Pain Associated with Endometriosis
summary: A randomized controlled trial of yoga examined emotional wellbeing. There was no significant difference between the two groups regarding the diary of menstrual patterns (p = 0.96). Yoga practice was associated with a reduction in levels of chronic pelvic pain and an improvement in QoL in women with endometriosis.
keyFindings: There was no significant difference between the two groups regarding the diary of menstrual patterns (p = 0.96).
Yoga practice was associated with a reduction in levels of chronic pelvic pain and an improvement in QoL in women with endometriosis.
limitations: Single-trial result; requires replication, and self-reported outcomes may inflate apparent effects.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
